title: XNLI - Cross-Lingual Natural Language Inference
description: Natural language inference annotation for cross-lingual evaluation, based on the XNLI benchmark (Conneau et al., EMNLP 2018). Annotators classify the relationship between a premise and hypothesis as entailment, neutral, or contradiction.
citation:

    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 2018 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing",
    month = oct # "-" # nov,

    address = "Brussels, Belgium",
